title: Persistent Memory
description: A persistent cross-session memory node that retains data across pipeline
invocations. Supports Redis for production and in-memory backends for
testing. Provides session management, keyed storage, history tracking,
and automatic summarization of older entries.

input.description: Questions are enriched with session memory context before forwarding

output.description: Questions with memory context attached in metadata

input.description: Answers are stored in session memory for future retrieval

redis_password.title: Redis Password
redis_password.description: Redis server password (leave empty for no auth)

session_ttl_hours.title: Session TTL (hours)
session_ttl_hours.description: How long sessions persist before auto-expiry (0 = no expiry)

max_history.title: Max History Entries
max_history.description: Maximum history entries per session before auto-summarization

auto_summarize.title: Auto-Summarize
auto_summarize.description: Automatically summarize older history entries when limit is reached

cases.name: Forwards a question with no session_id unchanged
